title: Services people in Mexico often compare for a Netherlands move
intro: Legalisation guides, planning tools, transfers, housing, insurance, and mobile—aligned with MVV and residence permit timelines.

items.reason: Understand apostille paths when Mexican documents feed into IND or gemeente procedures.
Plan sworn translations when Dutch or English versions are required.
Organise civil and sponsor documents before MVV submission.
Build a phased checklist with ?from=mexico context.
Sequence BSN, banking, and insurance after arrival.
Move MXN and EUR with transparent pricing for deposits and living costs.
Digital Dutch banking often used soon after BSN and address.
Traditional Dutch banking option some employers and landlords recognise easily.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
Dutch SIM options after you land.
